characters.name: Abner (man)
characters.description: Character onHey Arnold!Abner (man)AgeEither roughly 45-50 or 50-55FamilyUnknownFriendsUnknownVoiced by"Dom Irrera"Human Abneris a fictional character of theHey Arnold!TV Series. He shares the same name asArnold's pet pig,Abner. In the episodeAbner Come Home,Arnold was calling for his pig when he ran away the night before,the man in this episode,also named Abner though that Arnold was calling to him,but than a little irritated afterwards when he realize that Arnold wasn't calling for him and he slammed his window shut,due to a misunderstanding. This article is astub. It was too short or incomplete. Can you help Hey Arnold Wiki byexpanding the page?

characters.name: Abner (pig)
characters.description: Animal onHey Arnold!Original SeriesThe Jungle MovieAbner (pig)SpeciesPotbellied PigOwner(s)Arnold ShortmanVoiced byCraig Bartlett,Maurice LaMarcheAbneris Arnold's pet pig in theHey Arnold!TV Series. Abner is good at digging, like snuffling for truffles. Disturbingly, Abner seems to enjoy eating barbecued domestic pets (their crazy Grandpa barbecues domestic pets like cats, dogs, and pigs). Abner was given as a wedding gift to Arnold's parents, Miles, and Stella, from the "Green-Eyed people," who they helped save ("The Journal"), even thoughGrandpa Philwanted to barbecue him on the spot. Abner is good at digging, like snuffling for truffles. Disturbingly, Abner seems to enjoy eating barbecued domestic pets (their crazy Grandpa barbecues domestic pets like cats, dogs, and pigs).

characters.name: Betty
characters.description: Character onHey Arnold!BettyAgeEither roughly 45-50 or 50-55RelationshipsMr. LeichliterVoiced byAnndi McAfeeBettyis a fictional character in theHey Arnold!TV Series. She'sMr. Leichliter's old love. When Leichliter looks at a picture locket of Betty as a little girl, it's similar toHelga's picture locket ofArnold. At the end of this episode before the set collapses, she is seen as an adult. When Betty was a kid, she looked almost likeLila Sawyeronly she didn’t have her hair in braided pigtails and didn’t have freckles on her face.

characters.name: Big Gino (character)
characters.description: Character onHey Arnold!Big Gino (character)Nickname(s)"Big Gino" (full name unknown)OccupationStudentLoan SharkMafiosoAgeUnknownFamilyUnknownFriendsSid(formerly)Unnamed henchmenGerald(formerly)Mickey the WeaselIggyEdmundSiobhanRelationshipsKatrinka(implied)Voiced byCameron Van HoyBig Ginois a fictional character in theHey Arnold!TV series. Big Gino isP.S. 118's mob boss (although he's more of a parody) and loan shark. He loans candy to kids, but one should be careful when dealing with Big Gino unless they're absolutely sure they'll be able to pay him back, because he has eyes and ears everywhere, and he's not afraid to make things messy. One notable deal he made was withSid, who was unable to pay Gino back, and Sid became a member of his crew to pay off the debt. Sid soon paid off the debt, but he continued to work for Gino, which concernedArnold. Gino, perhaps to test Sid's loyalty, ordered Sid to give Arnold a "swirly", and take a picture. Sid ultimately was unable to do it, so Gino had his goons give Sid a swirly, and take a picture. This ended their friendship. He later appears in "Gerald's Game" as loyal number 2 (Marshall) toP.S. 118's king (of the group that played the game "The King Rules"),Gerald. He seemed to really be loyal to Gerald, as he spoke highly of him even when he wasn't present. After Gerald quits the game, they stop being friends, like with Sid.

characters.name: Billy
characters.description: Character onHey Arnold!BillyNickname(s)NoneOccupationSchool studentAgeUnknownFamilyUnknownFriendsUnknownRelationshipsUnknownNadine[Similar interest]Voiced bySam GifaldiWilliam "Billy"is a fictional character in theHey Arnold!TV Series. Nadine[Similar interest] His only speaking role is as a member of the "Dork Parade" (along withSheenaandBrainy) at the start of "Eugene's Bike". He has an "albino worm" collection (which are presumably maggots), although every now and then one finds its way underneath squished on the bottom ofHelga's shoes. He also had a cameo in "Mugged" where he got scared byArnold.

characters.name: Blind Man
characters.description: Character onHey Arnold!Original SeriesThe Jungle MovieBlind ManOccupationUnknownAgeRoughly 75-80FamilyUnknownFriendsKiller(Dog)RelationshipsN/AVoiced byKevin Michael Richardson. Blind Man(real name unknown) is a fictional character in theHey Arnold!TV Series. He is an elderly blind man, seen riding the subway in the episode "Das Subway". He reveals that he was not originally blind, and that his other senses got stronger after he lost his eyesight, particularly his sense of smell.

characters.name: Brainy
characters.description: Character onHey Arnold!Original SeriesThe Jungle MovieBrainyNickname(s)BrainyOccupation4th Grade Student5th Grade Student (Hey Arnold! The Jungle Movie)6th Grade Student (end ofHey Arnold! The Jungle Movie)Age9-10 (Original Series)around 11-12 (The Jungle Movie)FamilyParents:Brainy's FatherBrainy's MotherFriendsArnoldGeraldHaroldStinkySidCurlyEugeneSheenaHelga(one sided obsessive crush)PhoebeRhondaSheenaRelationshipsHelga(one-sided crush)Voiced byCraig BartlettBrainyis a fictional character in theHey Arnold!TV Series. Brainy's FatherBrainy's Mother Brainy is a quiet, slightly creepy kid who stalks Helga around and often randomly showing up in the least expected places whenever Helga is present, the most notable occasions being "Haunted Train" (in which, comically, he’s the only character to witness the annual occurrence of the real haunted train unless it was returning from the steel mill) and "Wheezin' Ed". This leads to one of the other kids asking him "What are you doing here?" to which he responds either with "Um...I dunno" or "Um...something?" Other than that, Brainy rarely speaks. Craig Bartlett has stated that he may have some supernatural quality, allowing him to move freely.

characters.description: BridgetBridgetNickname(s)UnknownOccupationHead of the Secret OrganizationAgeEither roughly 20-25 or 25-30RelationshipsUnknownVoiced byJennifer Jason LeighBridgetis a minor character in the 2002 movie version ofHey Arnold!. She's the head of the secret organization, and helpsArnoldandGeraldon their mission to save the neighborhood by giving them spy equipment. Bridget has long chestnut hair and wears a spysuit. characters.name: Caesar
characters.description: Character onHey Arnold!CaesarOccupationVariousAgeEither roughly 50-55 or 55-60Voiced bySteve VikstenCaesaris a fictional character in theHey Arnold!TV Series. Caesar is featured in the show with different roles of employment. These include a carnival ride operator in the episode "Love and Cheese", a cook in the episode "Buses, Bikes, and Subways", and a fish store employee in the episode "Friday the 13th". His name is also featured on the fish store. This article is astub. It was too short or incomplete. Can you help Hey Arnold Wiki byexpanding the page?

characters.name: Campfire Lass
characters.description: Character onHey Arnold!Campfire LassOccupationStudentFamilyUnknownFriendsUnknownRelationshipsUnknownVoiced byFrancesca Marie Smith Campfire Lass(real name unknown) is a fictional character in theHey Arnold!TV Series. A young girl who speaks with a Scottish accent, Campfire Lass is usually found wearing a "Campfire Lass" uniform and selling chocolate turtles to fund annual trips to Scotland. She "recruited" Arnold and Gerald to the "Campfire Lass" in the episode "Chocolate Turtles".
